program.faculty_name: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

source_notes: Compiled on 2026-06-10 from Sabancı University public sources for admit term 202401 (2024-2025 Fall).

Prerequisites: Banner course detail pages (bwckctlg.p_disp_course_detail, cat_term 202401; ENS 311 from 202501). Where Banner lists alternatives (incl. legacy EL/TE/MS codes), only the current-curriculum alternative is kept because the app treats prerequisite lists as all-required.
University Courses are university-wide and mirror the BSCS/BSMS files; the 202401 HUM pool has 9 courses (no HUM 304/324).
ENS 491 has no course prerequisite in Banner; enrollment is restriction-based (80 SU credits completed).
Core / Area elective lists: SU_DEGREE.p_list_courses P_AREA=BSME_CEL / BSME_AEL (same term).
ME 415 (Banner: MATH 201 or MATH 202) and ME 420 (Banner: ENS 207 or ME 307+ME 309 or ME 307+ENS 202 or ME 309+ENS 202) reduced to a single current-curriculum alternative.

rules.required_math_choice_rule: Students are required to complete either MATH 212 or both (MATH 201 and MATH 202). If more courses are completed than needed, the additional courses will not be included in core, area and free elective course pools.
rules.required_list_rule: In addition to fulfilling the mathematics requirement, students must successfully complete all courses listed under required courses.
rules.university_course_rule: From the University Courses listed below, 16 courses and 41 SU credits must be completed. All freshman courses (1XX coded courses, including PROJ 201) and SPS 303 are required. One HUM-coded course from the listed pool is required.
rules.free_elective_scope_rule: Free electives include all courses that are not counted under University Courses, Required Courses, Core Electives, or Area Electives.
rules.overflow_rule: Excess Core Elective credits are transferred to Area Electives; excess Area Elective credits are transferred to Free Electives.
rules.free_elective_faculty_rule: A total of 15 SU credits must be taken from courses offered by FASS, SBS, and FENS, excluding University Courses. Language courses offered by SL are not included in free electives.
rules.faculty_course_rule: At least 5 faculty courses must be completed.

Free Electives.definition: All courses not counted in University Courses, Required Courses, Core Electives, or Area Electives.
credit_flow_rules: Excess Core Elective credits count toward Area Electives.
Excess Area Elective credits count toward Free Electives.
Free Electives.notes: Free elective pool is dynamic and computed after applying category assignment and overflow rules.
